title: Nutty Silky Showoff British Walnut Salad
description: A delicious and visually appealing salad featuring dried cherries, toasted walnuts, and a touch of sweetness that is both nutty and silky. Perfect for showing off in any meal.

ingredients.name: Keto-friendly dressing (optional)
ingredients.notes: Blend with a fork to achieve a silky texture

instructions: Place the walnuts on a baking sheet and toast them in the oven until they are golden brown, about 10-12 minutes.
Chop the toasted walnuts into small pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine the dried cherries and chopped walnuts. If using a dressing, add it now to mix thoroughly with a fork.
Gently toss the mixture with the chopped lettuces leaves.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
